text:
AI Strategy Document

We are integrating Generative AI into our systems to improve productivity and automation.

AI systems should use Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) to ensure accurate and up-to-date responses.

Vector databases are used to store embeddings of documents for semantic search.

We use OpenAI APIs and other LLM providers for AI capabilities.

All AI systems must include monitoring, logging, and guardrails to ensure safe usage.

Company Handbook

We follow DevOps best practices including CI/CD automation and infrastructure as code.

Our systems are deployed using Docker containers and managed through Kubernetes clusters.

We use AWS, Azure, and GCP for cloud infrastructure.

Security is a top priority. All services must follow zero-trust principles and use encrypted communication.

Employees are encouraged to document their work and follow clean coding practices.

Engineering Guide

Our backend systems are primarily built using Java and Spring Boot.

Microservices architecture is preferred for scalability and flexibility.

We use REST APIs for communication between services.

Monitoring is done using Prometheus and Grafana.

Logs are centralized and analyzed for performance and debugging.
